race.description: Hygain Edge Fillies And Mares Hcp (Bm56)
race.comment: MAGNARDO (2) was a gutsy winner last time over 1200m at Mornington, scoring by 0.8 lengths to make it eight wins in a row. She's absolutely flying for Reece Goodwin and while she struggled on her only synthetic go, she's better now and can prove too slick again. TERRACOTTA ROSE (4) didn't do a bad job to finish 3 lengths away in fifth last start over 1000m at Werribee having won there nicely first up. Has the ability to return to the winner's list. BRAVE CAROL (5) returns after a spell of three-and-a-half months so she should have some residual fitness. Tricky draw but has the peaks to figure having won here in the past. JENNI LA ROCK (6) showed good early speed and raced on the pace when first-up after a spell last start before fading to finish fifth, beaten 6 lengths, over 1200m at Cranbourne. Expect plenty of improvement off that.
